results.title: Explosion at MOL’s Olefin 1 Plant in Tiszaújváros Leaves One Dead and Nine Injured
results.description: A deadly explosion at MOL Group’s Olefin 1 petrochemical plant in Tiszaújváros, Hungary, killed one person and injured nine others during a restart procedure. Investigators are examining the cause of the accident while the rest of the industrial complex remains operational. results.title: Late pass sends Felix Rosenqvist past David Malukas for the closest Indianapolis 500 win in history
results.description: Felix Rosenqvist swung to the outside of David Malukas, then found a way past the Team Penske driver to win the closest Indianapolis 500 in history by a margin of 0.0233 seconds on Sunday.
